channel.title: SPL - Capitol Hill Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Capitol Hill Branch

item.title: Resume Essentials
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Capitol Hill Branch, Meeting Room

In this session you'll learn how to design a resume that highlights your skills, experience, and achievements to catch the attention of employers.

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Capitol Hill Branch

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details

item.title: Family CRAFT-ernoon
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Capitol Hill Branch, Meeting Room

Families are invited to join us in making simple crafts.

Event details
